trustAndPromotionContract.trusted: May render summary stub or interactive same-shell side stage.
trustAndPromotionContract.degraded: May retain observe-only stage and provenance but suppress fresh insert and pin affordances.
trustAndPromotionContract.frozen: May preserve read-only provenance only under the current freeze disposition.
trustAndPromotionContract.pinning: Pinned content may not widen trust, actionability, or freshness posture.

accessibilityContract.stageSemantics: Promoted, pinned, downgraded, and folded stages render as a labelled complementary region.
accessibilityContract.summarySemantics: Summary stub renders as a labelled region with a native promote button.
accessibilityContract.disclosureControls: Promote and collapse controls use aria-expanded and aria-controls.
accessibilityContract.pinControls: Pin control uses aria-pressed and disables when trust posture blocks pinning.
accessibilityContract.foldedSemantics: Narrow folded state uses a tablist and tabpanel tied to the same stage binding.
keyboardModel: Tab reaches task canvas, DecisionDock, and assistive stage controls in DOM order
Enter and Space activate native buttons
Escape collapses a promoted stage back to the summary stub
Pin and collapse never trap focus
accessibilityContract.reducedMotion: prefers-reduced-motion removes promotion, collapse, and pin transitions
